name: Configuring Payment Types
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can configure diverse payment methods in Retail Express to accommodate customer payment preferences and integrate with ANZ payment systems, helping your retail operations provide flexible checkout options. This capability enables you to define and manage cash, card, EFTPOS, and alternative payment types, which helps ensure customers can pay using their preferred method while maintaining accurate financial tracking."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Setting up comprehensive payment type configurations enables your retail operations to support various payment scenarios, helping optimize checkout flexibility and financial reconciliation. This helps retail businesses meet customer payment expectations while ensuring all transaction types are properly categorized for accounting and reporting purposes."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"There are many payments methods available in Retail Express, which can be enabled individually depending on your requirements. Each Payment Type has a range of options, including whether it should be available within POS, open the Cash Draw, accrue loyalty points and more."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can also use Loyalty Points to pay for sales in POS"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enabling a Payment Type"}],"data-id":"enabling-a-payment-type"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To enable a Payment Types:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Navigate to: "},{"text":"Settings > Payment Types","bold":true}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/376FOAPI94DB/screenshot-2026-01-20-at-5-38-49-e2-80-afpm.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/376FOAPI94DB/screenshot-2026-01-20-at-5-38-49-e2-80-afpm.png","name":"Screenshot 2026-01-20 at 5.38.49 PM.png","type":"image/png","size":1144280,"width":2876,"height":1626,"displaySize":"large","float":"none","downloadUrl":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/api/v2/media/download-by-url?url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.v-cdn.net%2F6038474%2Fuploads%2F376FOAPI94DB%2Fscreenshot-2026-01-20-at-5-38-49-e2-80-afpm.png","active":true,"mediaID":1923,"dateInserted":"2026-01-20T12:09:12+00:00","insertUserID":1178,"foreignType":"embed","foreignID":"1178","embedType":"image"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"On Account is a legacy payment type and should not be used; it will not add any amounts owing to a customer account. For information on Account Customers please refer to the article Customers - Creating Account Customers."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"To display the payment method in POS tick the box in the "},{"text":"POS ","bold":true},{"text":"column"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Please confirm your requirements with your Accountant/Bookkeeper.Changing this setting will require MYOB or Xero to be disconnected and reconnected to update the configuration."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Tick "},{"text":"Auto-Reconcile in Cash Up ","bold":true},{"text":"to automatically insert the Expected Amount into the Amount Reconciled column during the Cash Up process"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click "},{"text":"Save Changes","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"To see the changes in POS you will need to "},{"text":"Log Out ","bold":true},{"text":"and "},{"text":"Log In ","bold":true},{"text":"again"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Outlet-Specific Payment Types"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Retail Express now supports configuring and reordering "},{"text":"payment types at the outlet level","bold":true},{"text":", allowing each store to display only the payment options they actively offer at the point of sale."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This enhancement helps streamline the POS experience by reducing on-screen clutter, minimising misclicks, and ensuring staff select from relevant payment methods during checkout."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If no outlet-specific payment configuration is applied, Retail Express will continue to use the existing global payment type behaviour, ensuring backward compatibility."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"url","url":"https://youtu.be/yOVIa6WY1pU","embedData":{"height":150,"width":200,"photoUrl":"https://i.ytimg.com/vi/yOVIa6WY1pU/hqdefault.jpg","videoID":"yOVIa6WY1pU","showRelated":false,"url":"https://youtu.be/yOVIa6WY1pU","embedType":"youtube","name":"Outlet Specific Payment Settings","frameSrc":"https://www.youtube.com/embed/yOVIa6WY1pU?feature=oembed&autoplay=1"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Payment Type columns"}],"data-id":"payment-type-columns"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Each column has individual tick boxes relating to the Payment Type on the left-hand side. See below for details on each column."}]},{"type":"table","children":[{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Column","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Details","bold":true}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Enable"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Enables the Payment Type for use, including visibility in reports. e.g. Income Report"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"POS"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Enable this Payment Type to be available in the Payments tab in POS"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Money Out"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Payment Type becomes available as tender when using the Money In / Out feature at POS"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Cash Drawer"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Tick to enable the cash drawer to open when this Payment Type is used"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Loyalty"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Enable the Payment Type to allow accrual of Loyalty points when used for payment"}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Summarise for Accounting"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Used with Accounting Integrations. Tick to send only a single total for all payments made using that Payment Type or untick to send individual totals."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Auto-Reconcile in Cash Up"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Enabling this option will automatically populate the \"Expected Amount\" into the \"Amount Reconciled\" field in Step 3 of the Cash Up."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Cash is not eligible to be auto-reconciled."}]}]}]},{"type":"tr","children":[{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Loyalty Multiplier"}]}]},{"type":"td","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The number of points accrued when the payment type is used e.g. entering a value of 1 would accrue 1 point for every $1 dollar paid."}]}]}]}],"id":"rich-table-ec1b249e","colSizes":[300,300]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The POS option must be ticked to display in POS."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Example Scenarios:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Some integrated EFTPOS solutions will determine the card type on its use at POS, and assign the payment to the specific Payment Type i.e. a payment made via integrated EFTPOS with a VISA card would report in the Income Report as VISA, even though Tyro or PC-EFTPOS was selected as the Payment Type at POS."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This scenario may also be used if you wanted to have Paypal available for use for web store payments, but wouldn't want PayPal available for selection as a tender at POS. Again, using the Enabled tick still allows you to run reports filtering for that Payment Type."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"PC-EFTPOS has been renamed to Linkly but is still currently referred to as PC-EFTPOS within the Retail Express application."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Available Payment
